rules: Treatments use the same simulator decision rules.
Treatments change only public scriptable parameters through antSim.setParam.
Effects are measured relative to the baseline treatment within each scenario.

treatments.name: fast_pheromone_loss
treatments.description: Higher evaporation and higher sensing threshold; tests trail fragility.

treatments.name: persistent_pheromone
treatments.description: Lower evaporation and lower sensing threshold; tests trail persistence and possible over-commitment.

treatments.name: high_diffusion
treatments.description: Higher diffusion; tests whether broadened gradients reduce trail precision.

treatments.name: brood_demand_high
treatments.description: Higher brood-demand pressure; tests foraging versus brood-care tradeoff.
